data.name: Language-Guided Grasping under Partial Observation for Mobile Manipulation in Field Inspection and Maintenance

data.description: Language-Guided Grasping under Partial Observation for Mobile Manipulation in Field Inspection and Maintenance discusses Sim-to-Real Transfer.
